web.title: One AI bubble has already burst. The next one—a 'rare ... - Fortune
web.description: The AI stock bubble, much debated through the back half of 2025, has already burst. That's the conclusion of John Higgins, chief markets economist at Capital Economics.

web.title: AI bubble - Wikipedia
web.description: The AI bubble is a theorised stock market bubble growing since 2025 amid the AI boom, a period of rapid increase in investment in artificial intelligence (AI) that is affecting the broader economy. [4] Speculation about a bubble largely originates from concerns that leading AI tech firms are involved in a circular flow of investments that are artificially inflating the value of their stocks ...

web.title: AI Bubble: What Wall Street Really Thinks In 2026 - Investor's Business ...
web.description: Market headlines keep circling the same question: Is an AI bubble forming? Here's what Wall Street and CEOs are saying now.
